abilities.description: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature with trample or haste.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature with trample or haste

abilities.description: Sacrifice a creature. When you do, CARDNAME deals X damage to any target, where X is that creature's power. If the sacrificed creature was a Hamster, draw X cards.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, if you don't control a creature named Boo, create Boo, a legendary 1/1 red Hamster creature token with trample and haste.
